caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a presentation titled "Rural Community Food System." The main content area features a slide with a white background on the left and a complex, dark network diagram with blue nodes and connecting lines on the right. The text on the slide begins with "Introduction" and asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" It includes a section for "Session Videos" with a list of dates and a call to action stating, "You can contribute to the development of this model by adding community or by drawing a member to evolve the map." A "References" section lists "Large Corporate Farm Systems" and "Community Hubs and More of More Production." In the top right corner of the browser window, a small video feed shows a man with glasses and a dark shirt. The layout remains static across the sequence, with minimal movement visible in the man's video feed.
